theme_notes: FIFA World Cup 2026 opens tomorrow (June 11) across USA/Canada/Mexico — 48 teams, Infantino's 'chill' presser, a Somali referee denied US entry; US-Iran conflict escalating (Iran struck Kuwait and Bahrain, Kuwait airport taken out by drones, Trump threatening Iran will 'pay the price'); House GOP passed $70B immigration crackdown with child separations redux; NBA Finals (Knicks vs. Spurs) with $1M celebrity-row seats and Trump crashing Game 3.
settled: Zero. The World Cup starts tomorrow. This is the last thing anyone's thinking about.
Balanced. Cleaner than the Strait of Hormuz. Lower stakes than Game 4.
Clean slate. Even Trump's Iran ultimatum couldn't complicate this.
youOwe: Less than a World Cup souvenir scarf. At least the scarf would keep you warm.
You owe $40. Kuwait lost an airport to drones. Context helps.
Smaller than Infantino's 'chill' is worth. About the same moral weight.
That's a World Cup Panini starter pack. You're the duplicate nobody keeps.
Messi earns this before the national anthems finish. He also settles up.
The judge struck down a $100k visa fee. Nobody's striking down yours.
Enough to scalp a Group Stage seat in Guadalajara. Instead you're here, owing.
Trump told Iran it will 'pay the price.' Your partner is taking the same notes.
Kuwait suspended flights after the drone attack. Your partner is suspending goodwill.
Congress passed $70 billion to build walls. Your partner is building one too, mentally.
Iran's ceasefire collapsed for less than this. You've been warned.
The Knicks sold $700 nosebleeds for the Finals. You'd have more dignity there.
Iran fired missiles at two countries. Trump called it proportional. This is not.
You could've flown to Mexico City for the World Cup opener. Instead: this.
Two celebrity-row Finals seats went for $1M. You owe $2k. One of these is embarrassing.
The House passed $70 billion in enforcement. Your partner is drafting their own bill.
Messi is in the US defending a World Cup. You're not defending anything. Just owing.
Iran fired on Kuwait, Bahrain, and you. Financially speaking.
theyOwe: They owe you $20 and treating it like a Panini duplicate. It is not a duplicate.
Smaller than a World Cup program. Bigger than their memory of it.
That's $15. Infantino told a whole stadium to chill. Don't chill. Collect.
That's one Panini sticker album starter kit. All of it is yours.
The Somali referee got denied US entry. Your money is equally denied return.
World Cup opens tomorrow. Everyone's distracted. Perfect time to send the invoice.
Kuwait got hit by drones and still figured out its next move. So should you.
A scalped Group Stage ticket in Dallas. They owe you a trip. Or $300.
The judge struck down a $100k visa fee. Nobody's striking down what they owe you.
Spike Lee paid full price for his Knicks Finals seat. Unlike your partner.
At $800 you are no longer a partner. You are a creditor. Dress accordingly.
The US launched strikes over a downed helicopter. Your threshold can be lower.
Trump crashed Game 3 and canceled a watch party. They canceled your payment plan.
Fly to the World Cup. Watch Messi. Send them the bill. They owe you Argentina.
US-Iran: 'not popular.' This receivable is not popular in this household either.
Iran fired missiles across the Gulf. Respond proportionally. Lawyers exist.
House GOP wrote a $70B check. You need 0.01% of that energy. Find it.
Messi earns $5k in a firm handshake. Your partner is the Messi of avoiding you.
